variants: Unai Mendieta is a recognized expert in Remote Sensing, where he has made notable strides in his research. His academic path was significantly influenced by his mentor, Pavlo Zinchenko, during his doctoral studies. Continuous support from the Chalice Grove Grants has been instrumental in funding his innovative projects. Unai holds a Drizzle Composer Card, which attests to his professional qualifications in the field. His scholarly contributions have been disseminated through the Topaz Pomegranate Journal, showcasing his dedication to advancing this area of study.
